segments.text: hey dana thanks for making time I want to lock the Q3 budget today if we can
yes let's do it I sent you the the updated model last night version seven
saw it um first the headline where's runway landing after these changes
with the current plan we're at fourteen months of runway burning about two hundred and ten thousand a month
okay fourteen is is workable but I don't want it dropping under twelve
right so that constrains the marketing ask they came in asking for a hundred and twenty thousand for the quarter
a hundred twenty is too much given pipeline coverage um what did they actually convert last quarter
they spent ninety and sourced about six hundred thousand in pipeline of which roughly a third closed so decent but not not spectacular
let's approve ninety five thousand for marketing in Q3 and revisit mid quarter if CAC holds
ninety five approved noted I'll tell them today
on hiring I think we hold the freeze except except for the data role we keep losing deals on analytics
agreed the model has one senior data engineer at one eighty five base plus benefits starting September first everything else stays frozen
good I'll email the recruiter this afternoon to open the search
next the office lease renewal is due the landlord came back at eight thousand four hundred a month for a twelve month term
that's up what four percent from last year um given hybrid I thought about going smaller
I looked the smaller suites nearby are actually more per seat and moving costs would eat two years of savings
fine let's renew at eighty four hundred for twelve months decision made
also I did the SaaS audit we're paying for nineteen tools nobody has logged into in ninety days that's three thousand two hundred a month
wow yes kill them can you own cancelling those
I'll cancel the unused subscriptions by end of next week thirty two hundred a month back
one open thing payroll um the provider raised fees again should we move to a cheaper platform
I honestly don't know yet switching mid year is painful for tax filings let me not answer that today
okay parked um what's left for the board
I'll commit to sending the revised financial model to the board by July twenty first ahead of the meeting on the twenty eighth
perfect so recap marketing at ninety five k one data hire at one eighty five lease renewed at eighty four hundred SaaS cuts save thirty two hundred
and runway stays around fourteen months at about two ten burn yes
great thanks dana talk next week
